block_01:
Online trading is surrounded with unfortunate misinformation.
Today we’d like to help you sort the facts from total fiction.
block_02: “Online trading like Forex or Options is basically gambling”
block_03: Not unless you treat it that way. Trading requires an enormous amount of education, preparation and practice. If you enter this field with all of the dedication it requires, you’ll be sure to reap the benefits.
block_05: Not necessarily. While larger investments may yield a proportionally larger profit, you don’t have to go all in. The trading instruments available from IQ Option allow you to trade costly assets like stocks or cryptocurrencies for a fraction of their price. With IQ Option the exciting world of trading is not only accessible, but affordable as well.
block_06: “It’s impossible to profit without trading signals”
block_07: Quite the opposite - it’s the over-reliance on trading signals and indicators that gets traders into trouble. Not to mention that a significant portion of signal providers are swindlers. It’s much wiser to use a combination of technical and economic analysis in your trading.
block_08: Got any other questions or concerns?
block_10: so we can set your mind at ease.
